per_outcome.operationalization: count of new commits to the package repository during the quarter, measured from GitHub commit logs
count of commits with net positive function additions across all files, classified programmatically from commit diffs
count of commits without new function additions, classified programmatically from commit diffs
count of commits classified as feature addition or code optimization, classification method not specified
count of commits classified as bug fixes, cleanup, dependency updates, deprecation, or refactoring
count of version releases published to the package repository during the quarter
